description: LinkedIn profile page of John W. Miles, President & Chief Science Officer at Superstratum Labs, specializing in mycotoxin cleaning and mold protection; cut to this when introducing the interview subject or establishing his credentials.
A tightly wound roll of flexible HVAC duct material viewed end-on, revealing its hollow core; cut to this when discussing ductwork materials, installation components, or airflow pathways.
Superstratum Labs — John Miles' company. Show when John Miles introduces himself or discusses Superstratum.
Infographic comparing peel strength vs. shear strength with labeled diagrams and directional arrows; cut to this when explaining adhesive or mechanical bonding concepts.
Interior view looking down a corrugated flexible HVAC duct with a camera or probe cable visible, ideal for cutting to when discussing duct inspection or the condition of existing ductwork.
A rotating brush agitates dust and debris inside a metal HVAC duct, ideal for cutting to during discussion of the mechanical cleaning process.
Cover page of the CIRI Journal of Cleaning Science (the journal that published the report). Show this journal cover JUST BEFORE the article (broll_08) when the report is introduced.
The feature article itself — David Hart's report. Show when he reads or references the report title.
Page from David Hart's report (test results / failure-mode figures). Part of the report; show briefly in sequence after the article.
Page from David Hart's report (lab data table of duct damage). Part of the report; show briefly in sequence.
Page from David Hart's report (risks & recommendations). Part of the report; show briefly in sequence.

A gallon jug of Superstratum Building Cleaner with product callouts highlighting mycotoxin removal and HE-HOCl formula; cut to this when discussing chemical treatments or sanitizing agents used after duct cleaning.

A gallon jug of Superstratum Endurance Coating Pro with feature callouts highlighting mold resistance and water-resistant film; cut to this when discussing mold-prevention treatments or protective coatings applied inside ductwork.
